evals.prompt: Create a plan for adding WebSocket support to this project. There is existing research at .prism/shared/research/2026-03-07-websocket-research.md.
evals.expected_output: Interactive planning flow that loads research context before presenting understanding
expectations: prism-analyzer agent is spawned to extract decisions, constraints, and patterns from the research document
Understanding is presented to the user BEFORE writing the full plan (interactive rule)
User confirmation is requested before proceeding to full plan
Plan is NOT written in one shot -- structure approval is requested first

evals.prompt: Plan the implementation for a new CLI dashboard screen that shows real-time test results.
evals.expected_output: Plan document saved to .prism/shared/plans/ with all required sections
expectations: Success criteria are split into Automated Verification and Manual Verification sections
Each phase includes specific file paths and verification commands
A 'What We Are NOT Doing' scope section is included
Risks and mitigations section is present
TodoWrite is used to track phases

evals.prompt: I need a plan to migrate our database from SQLite to PostgreSQL. I'm not sure about the approach yet.
evals.expected_output: Multiple design options are presented with pros/cons before committing to a plan
expectations: Design options (Option A, Option B, etc.) are presented with pros and cons
User is asked to choose an approach before plan is written
Questions are asked to resolve unknowns rather than assuming
Plan includes migration and rollback considerations (Be Practical philosophy)
